message:
feat(core): add persistent_ds.rs — immutable data structures with structural sharing (ft-283h4.7.1)

Persistent data structures for time-travel debugging and efficient versioning:
- PersistentVec<T>: radix-32 trie with O(log₃₂ n) get/set/push/pop
- PersistentMap<K,V>: HAMT with O(log₃₂ n) insert/remove/get
- VersionedStore<T>: version history with timestamp lookup and eviction
- MapDiff: change detection between map versions
- All mutations produce new versions; old versions remain valid via Arc sharing

68 unit tests + 36 proptest properties (104 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
